def positive_persistent_model_field_encodes_transport_concern():
    rule_id = "persistent_model_field_encodes_transport_concern"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "SQLAlchemy or Django ORM model carries a field that encodes HTTP or transport metadata such as status codes."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
